name: MagiCarnage
short_description: Once every millennium, the greatest magical beings gather together in order to engage one another in tournament combat. Cast powerful spells and shatter your opponents, this is MagiCarnage!
detailed_description:
Once every millennium, the greatest magical beings gather together in order to engage one another in mystical combat.
This is MagiCarnage. A tournament held to prove who is the strongest magic user in the realm, and worthy of the title "Champion Magus".

MagiCarnage is a top down, arena-fighting twin-stick shooter game.
You will play as magical beings and engage in battles with others utilizing a large selection of unique and powerful spells.

  • Online Multiplayer!
  • Local Multiplayer!
  • Single Player Mode!
  • Partial Controller Support!
  • Customizable loadouts!
  • Tons of unique spells & skins!
  • Plenty of achievements to unlock!

    (Controllers are required for local multiplayer)
